Part I Part II
Item 1. Business.......... 3 Item 1A. Risk Factors.......... 12 Item 2. Properties.......... 28 Item 3. Legal Proceedings.......... 29 Item 4. Mine Safety Disclosures.......... 30 Item 5. Market for Registrant.......... 31 Item 6. Selected Financial Data.......... 32

Part I

Item 1. Business

Acme Corp is a global leader in widget manufacturing, serving customers in over 50 countries. Founded in 1985, the company has grown to employ more than 10,000 people worldwide. Our primary products include industrial widgets, smart widgets, and widget accessories.

Revenue for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023 was $4.2 billion, representing a 7% increase over the prior year. Operating income was $620 million. The company continues to invest heavily in research and development to drive future growth.

Item 1A. Risk Factors

Our business is subject to numerous risks, including but not limited to: macroeconomic conditions, competitive pressures, supply chain disruptions, and regulatory changes. In particular, rising raw material costs represent a significant risk to our gross margins. We have implemented hedging strategies to partially mitigate commodity price exposure.

Cybersecurity threats are an increasing concern. We have invested in information security programs, but cannot guarantee that all attacks will be prevented or detected promptly. A significant breach could result in material harm to our reputation and financial results.
